events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component/material/condition involved. Photo blocked by packaging/glare, visible outline suggests right area but identifying mark and connection details cannot be read. Stage rough-complete. Need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since evidence insufficient to verify compliance, decision likely needs_more_info. Risk? If cannot inspect connections, tags, orientation, maybe medium/high? In industrial site, incomplete inspection of transmitter installation could lead to incorrect process measurement, leaks, etc. But since only photo blocked, not necessarily a defect observed, just insufficient info. Decision needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium because unverified installation. Work_stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 70? Value not asked, leave 0. component_conditions empty (none flagged). findings: photo obscured, identification marks unreadable, connection details not visible. actions: remove packaging, clean glare, retake photos, verify tag, orientation, impulse lines, seals, electrical connections per API RP 551 and mfr manuals. rationale: cannot confirm compliance due to obstructed view. references: API RP 551, manufacturer manuals. Need ensure JSON valid.
